evals.prompt: Run a self-check on paper.tex for a NeurIPS submission and tell me which issues block submission versus which are only quality improvements.
evals.expected_output: Infer or accept self-check mode, run the audit flow, and return a report that lists Critical or P0 blockers before non-blocking issues and checklist items.

evals.prompt: Review this paper like a skeptical reviewer, include multi-perspective criticism, and end with a prioritized revision roadmap.
evals.expected_output: Route to review mode, separate Phase 0 script findings from agent-style judgments, and produce a synthesis with strengths, weaknesses, questions, scores, and a revision roadmap.

evals.prompt: Is paper.pdf ready to submit to IEEE, or does it fail the gate because of blocking layout or checklist issues?
evals.expected_output: Route to gate mode for PDF input, report PASS or FAIL clearly, and list blocking issues and failed checklist items before any informational notes.

evals.prompt: Re-audit this revised manuscript against report_v1.md and tell me which issues are fully fixed, partially fixed, or still unresolved.
evals.expected_output: Route to re-audit mode, require the previous report path, compare prior versus fresh findings, and show a verification checklist with score deltas and any new issues.

evals.prompt: Polish the writing of paper.tex, but only if the audit does not find blockers that should stop polishing first.
evals.expected_output: Route to polish mode, read the precheck state, stop on blockers, and only describe the critic or mentor follow-up flow when polishing is actually safe to continue.

evals.prompt: Run a full review of paper.tex with literature search. Find related work I might have missed, score all 9 dimensions.
evals.expected_output: Output has 'Related Literature' section; 9 dimensions scored including Literature Grounding; [Script]/[LLM] labels present; missing papers listed with relevance.

evals.prompt: Self-check paper.pdf with scholar evaluation and tell me the predicted score with confidence interval.
evals.expected_output: 9-dim scores present; Literature Grounding shown (N/A if no --literature-search); regression/fallback type indicated; confidence interval displayed.

evals.prompt: Compare paper.tex against latest literature and tell me which important papers I'm missing.
evals.expected_output: Missing papers listed with relevance scores and reasons; Literature Grounding score computed; specific suggestions for which papers to cite and where.
